title: Action items without owners, deadlines, or tracking tickets
code_snippet:
## Action Items

- Improve monitoring
- Be more careful with deploys
- Add more tests
- Fix the pipeline
violated_rule: Action items have owners and deadlines — every item concrete and tracked
expected_feedback: Critical: action items are vague with no owners or deadlines. 'Improve monitoring' is not actionable — who does it, by when, how do you verify it's done? Each item needs: specific description, owner (@person or @team), deadline (date), tracking ticket (JIRA/Linear). Categorize as prevent/detect/mitigate.
coverage_rules: Every action item has an owner and deadline
Action items must be concrete and verifiable
